challenges.title: No Bottle Sprint
challenges.description: Bring a reusable bottle to class every day this week
challenges.impact: Community-created mission to keep ZeroTrace behavior visible.

challenges.title: Bottle-Free Week
challenges.description: Avoid buying single-use plastic bottles for the next 7 days.
challenges.impact: Cuts a high-frequency daily plastic habit immediately.

challenges.title: Cutlery Off Mission
challenges.description: Order food without disposable cutlery and napkin packs all week.
challenges.impact: Stops the hidden extras that make delivery waste spike.

challenges.title: Wrap Detox
challenges.description: Use boxes, jars, or beeswax wraps instead of cling film.
challenges.impact: Turns one kitchen habit into a repeatable low-waste system.

challenges.title: Bag Ban Sprint
challenges.description: Carry your own bag every time you leave home this week.
challenges.impact: Builds a frictionless reusable habit fast.

challenges.title: ZeroTrace Audit
challenges.description: Count every plastic item you throw away for one full week.
challenges.impact: Awareness creates the fastest compounding behavior change.

challenges.title: Refill Run
challenges.description: Visit one refill station or eco store this week.
challenges.impact: Connects your digital plan to a real-world replacement habit.

challenges.title: One Meal, Zero Plastic
challenges.description: Complete one meal or snack with no single-use plastic packaging.
challenges.impact: Shows how small moments add up into visible impact.
